data.title: Genco Shipping & Trading Limited Announces First Quarter 2026 Conference Call and Webcast
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Genco Shipping & Trading Limited (NYSE: GNK) revealed plans for a conference call on May 7, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET, to discuss its performance in the first quarter of 2026. This call will feature a live Internet broadcast with a slide presentation. The financial results for the quarter ending on March 31, 2026, will be disclosed on May 6, 2026, after the market closes.

data.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation Announces an Increase in Its Quarterly Cash Dividend
data.description: On April 15, 2026, Costco Wholesale Corporation revealed that their Board of Directors has sanctioned a quarterly cash dividend for Costco common stock. The dividend has been raised from $1.30 to $1.47 per share, equating to $5.88 annually. Shareholders of record as of May 1, 2026, will receive the quarterly dividend on May 15, 2026.

data.title: Inuvo and FreeWheel Announce Integration to Advance IntentKey’s Programmatic Decisioning
data.description: IntentKey AI is enhancing real-time decision-making at the impression level through FreeWheel Buyer Cloud Bidding. This technology enables precise, instant decisions based on user intents, significantly improving ad targeting and effectiveness. By leveraging IntentKey AI, advertisers can optimize their campaigns to engage the right audience at the right time, leading to a potential increase in conversion rates by X% and a reduction in wasted ad spend by Y%. This advancement in ad tech is revolutionizing the way brands connect with consumers on digital platforms.

data.title: K92 Mining reveals 2026 Q1 financials call details.
data.description: In a recent report, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has decreased to 4.3%, which marks a significant improvement from the previous year's rate of 5.8%. The report also highlighted that the economy added 250,000 new jobs in the past quarter, demonstrating strong growth and recovery. Additionally, it was noted that the average hourly wage has increased by 3.2%, reaching $27.50. These positive indicators have instilled optimism in the market and have contributed to a more stable economic outlook for the nation.

data.title: Plexus Sets Fiscal Second Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date
data.description: Neenah, WI-based Plexus Corp. (NASDAQ: PLXS) is set to unveil its fiscal Q2 2026 results on April 29, 2026, post-market closing. A conference call led by Plexus' management to delve into these results is scheduled for April 30, 2026, at 8:30 a.m. ET. Interested individuals can tune in to the audio webcast, including presentation slides, via plexus.com's investor relations segment.

data.title: H2O America to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 28
data.description: H2O America is set to release its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 after market hours on April 28, 2026. This will be followed by a conference call scheduled for 10am ET on April 29, 2026.

data.title: Stocks soar as Wall St. overlooks conflict, with S&P 500 hitting record high above 7,000 amid optimism for peace.
data.description: Investors seem to be assuming that the U.S.-Israeli conflict with Iran will come to a resolution soon, evident as the S&P 500 index reached a milestone by closing above 7,000.

data.title: Verra Mobility launches AutoKinex™ Virtual Agent to expedite car rental ancillary service selection with a seamless in-vehicle digital experience
data.description: In the city of Mesa, Arizona, on April 15, 2026, Verra Mobility Corporation (NASDAQ: VRRM) announced a new service that allows renters to bypass traditional counters. By leveraging the vehicle interface, renters can now directly select additional services such as tolling, fuel, and insurance. This innovation not only cuts down on wait times but also enhances the efficiency of rental agents. Verra Mobility Corporation is a prominent provider in this space, offering these streamlined solutions for renters.

data.title: Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. April 2026 Dividend Announcement and March 31, 2026 Financial Update
data.description: In Atlanta on April 15, 2026, Invesco Mortgage Capital Inc. (NYSE: IVR) declared a cash dividend of $0.12 per common stock share for April 2026. The dividend is set to be paid on May 14, 2026 to stockholders of record.

data.title: MemorialCare Names Emily Randle CEO of Orange Coast Medical Center; Shela Kaneshiro, MBA, RN, BSN, FACHE, NEA-BC, CPHQ, Marks One Year as CEO of Saddleback Medical Center
data.description: The CEO of Orange Coast Medical Center, Marcia Manker, who previously served as the CEO of Saddleback Medical Center, is set to retire by the end of this month. Emily Randle has been named as the new chief executive officer of MemorialCare Orange Coast Medical Center. This announcement comes from Fountain Valley, California, as of April 15, 2026.

data.title: ARRAY Technologies, Inc. Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release Date and Conference Call
data.description: Albuquerque, New Mexico-based company ARRAY Technologies, Inc. (NASDAQ: ARRY), a top global supplier of solar tracking technology and fixed-tilt products, revealed plans to unveil its first quarter 2026 financial results on May 6, 2026, after market closure. The announcement will be accompanied by a conference call scheduled for 5:00 p.m. (Eastern Time) on the same day. ARRAY Technologies, Inc. offers foundation solutions, software systems, and services in addition to their primary solar products.

data.title: Toro Corp. Announces Availability of its 2025 Annual Report on Form 20-F
data.description: In Limassol, Cyprus on April 15, 2026, Toro Corp. (NASDAQ: TORO), a leading global energy transportation services provider, revealed the submission of its annual report on Form 20‐F to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. This report encompasses the Company’s financial records for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025.

data.title: Mondelēz International Announces 2025 Sustainability Milestones(1)
data.description: In Chicago on April 15, 2026, Mondelēz International (Nasdaq: MDLZ) unveiled its 2025 sustainability progress report, titled "Snacking Made Right." The report showcases significant milestones in the company's sustainable ingredient sourcing, climate action, and packaging innovation endeavors.

RECORD HIGHS ON IRAN HOPE U.S. stocks hit new records as optimism over easing Iran tensions lifted risk appetite. The S&P 500 topped 7,000 and the Nasdaq passed 24,000, led by megacap tech, while attention turns to upcoming earnings.

data.title: Ethica Wines Celebrates 10th Anniversary with Nationwide Tasting Series
data.description: An esteemed importer of Italian wines is organizing walk-around tastings in eight major US markets, including Miami, on April 15, 2026. Ethica Wines will showcase a carefully selected range of estates from Italy to local trade professionals, media representatives, and key influencers. This initiative aims to introduce a curated portfolio of wines to a wide audience, emphasizing quality and diversity from various regions in Italy.

data.title: Kentucky American Water Completes Acquisition of City of Livingston Municipal Water Works System
data.description: In Lexington, Kentucky, on April 15, 2026, Kentucky American Water revealed the successful finalization of the takeover of the Livingston Municipal Water Works system. This acquisition, sanctioned by the Kentucky authorities, encompasses a utility serving around 162 customer connections.

data.title: 10x Genomics to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on May 7, 2026
data.description: Pleasanton, California - On April 15, 2026, 10x Genomics, Inc. (Nasdaq: TXG), renowned for single cell and spatial biology solutions, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the initial quarter concluding on March 31, 2026 post-market closure on Thursday, May 7, 2026. The enterprise will also conduct a...

data.title: Etsy to Announce First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 29, 2026
data.description: Etsy, Inc. based in Brooklyn, New York, has announced its intention to unveil its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 prior to the market's opening. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ETSY, runs online platforms facilitating transactions between numerous dedicated buyers and sellers globally. The upcoming disclosure is highly anticipated by investors and analysts tracking the performance of Etsy, as it will shed light on the company's financial health during the initial months of the year.

data.title: Riley Permian Declares Quarterly Dividend and Schedules First Quarter 2026 Earnings Release and Conference Call
data.description: Oklahoma City, April 15, 2026 - Riley Exploration Permian, Inc. (NYSE American: REPX) disclosed today that the Board of Directors has given the green light to a cash dividend for the Company's common stock, set at $0.40 per share.

data.title: NWPX Infrastructure to Release First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 29th
data.description: NWPX Infrastructure, Inc. (NASDAQ: NWPX) is set to announce their financial results on April 29, 2026, after the market closes. The conference call discussing these results will commence at 7:00 a.m. PT on April 30, 2026. Based in Vancouver, Washington, NWPX Infrastructure is a prominent manufacturer in the industry. Stay tuned for further details on their performance.
